title: Jungle Pool Bali
promptText: exotic tropical shot of an Indian woman in a private pool, [same 100% identical face uploaded], [SKIN_TONE: luminous in humid light], wearing [BIKINI_STYLE: tropical print string bikini], [LOCATION: Infinity pool of a private jungle villa in Bali], [ACTION: Emerging from the water, wet hair flip], [EMOTION: Refreshed, connected to nature, sensual], [LIGHTING: Dappled sunlight filtering through dense jungle canopy], [BACKGROUND: Lush green rainforest and Balinese architecture], brand embedding "GetAiPrompt.in" on a stone statue, 8K, cinematic nature travel, --ar 9:16.
